languages.text: "Я наш{mf|ел|ла} окровалвенное тряпье у вашего тайного хода".

traits.locale_text: "Я наш{mf|ел|ла} окровалвенное тряпье у вашего тайного хода".
"Я наш{mf|ел|ла} окровалвенное тряпье у вашего тайного хода".

languages.text: "I found a pile of bloody rags near the secret entrance to your vault."
languages.original_text: "Я наш{mf|ел|ла} окровалвенное тряпье у вашего тайного хода".

traits.locale_text: "What about the pile of bloody rags in your vault?"
"What about the pile of bloody rags in your vault?"
"I found a pile of bloody rags near the secret entrance to your vault."

languages.text: "Ich habe einen Haufen blutiger Lumpen in der Nähe des geheimen Eingangs zu eurem Tresor gefunden."
languages.original_text: "I found a pile of bloody rags near the secret entrance to your vault."

languages.text: "J'ai trouvé un tas de chiffons ensanglantés près de l'entrée secrète de votre caveau."
languages.original_text: "I found a pile of bloody rags near the secret entrance to your vault."

languages.text: "我在你金库的秘密入口附近 发现了一堆带血的破布"
languages.original_text: "I found a pile of bloody rags near the secret entrance to your vault."

languages.text: "Encontré una pila de trapos ensangrentados cerca de la entrada secreta a tu bóveda".
languages.original_text: "I found a pile of bloody rags near the secret entrance to your vault."

languages.text: "金庫室の秘密の入り口付近で、血まみれのボロ布の山を見つけた"
languages.original_text: "I found a pile of bloody rags near the secret entrance to your vault."

languages.text: "Kasanızın gizli girişinin yanında bir yığın kanlı paçavra buldum."
languages.original_text: "I found a pile of bloody rags near the secret entrance to your vault."
